creator: al@o.dp.ua
text:
================= CONFIG GUEST OS ==============
#kernel = "/usr/lib/xen/boot/hvmloader"
kernel = "/home/al/xen/kernels/freebsd82_rc3/v02/kernel"
#builder='hvm'
memory = 256
name = "b5"
vcpus=3
pae=0
acpi=0
apic=1
#cpus = "3,4"
vif = [
        'mac=00:0c:29:2e:61:85, bridge=br1'
]
disk = [
        'phy:/dev/sdb13,hda,w'
        ,'phy:/dev/sdb23,hdb,w'
]

on_poweroff = 'destroy'
on_reboot   = 'restart'
on_crash    = 'restart'
device_model = '/usr/lib/xen/bin/qemu-dm'
boot='c'
serial='pty'
ne2000=0

usb=1
usbdevice='tablet'
======================= END config ===================
xm list
